name: SAM Registry Hive Handle Request Detected
description: Request to SAM registry hive is detected. This is a highly suspicious activity as the SAM hive contains local user password hashes. Attackers often use this technique to dump credentials for lateral movement or privilege escalation.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the attempt to access the SAM registry hive on host `{hostname}` at `{timestamp}`. The event was triggered by the process `{process_name}` with Process ID `{process_id}`. Identify the user (`{user_name}`) who initiated this request. Determine if this is a legitimate administrative action or a malicious attempt to steal credentials. Provide a summary of the findings and recommend steps to contain the threat and reset credentials if necessary.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the activity was detected.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that attempted to access the SAM hive.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: The Process ID of the process that attempted to access the SAM hive.

parameters.name: user_name
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
